TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Song Ciao simpo == Song Ciao (Inkiris: Georges Massin, 1916 miheca 9 folad 2 romi'ad ‚Äď 2007 miheca 10 folad 2 romi'ad), pangangan sa ci "Song Ciao mama", o nano Belgium Tinsokiwkay niocoran a tarokos, o sakapot patirengay to Joseph (Ruose) isingan i Yunlinsien no Taywan, saka tolo rekad pakalayapay to isingan pacakatay to kompay. Salongan pasifana' to 'orip 'Ayaway miheca Song Ciao, i 1916 miheca 9 folad 2 romi'ad masofoc i Belgium, i 1942 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad i Leuven no Tingsokiw daykako, macakat malasimpo, malakapot ci Lei Mingyuan simpo tayra i Jiangsu no Congko patenakay . Sa'ayaw i, maocor cingra tayra i cecay kanatal no Haimensien i Jiangsu patenakay . Mapatireng ko Conghuarenmin kongheko itiya i, marofo ko kakeridan, ma'edef ko kiwkay, oya sato ci Song Ciao tayra sato i isingan no salikaka malacitodongay milintokingay tayal, nanoyaan minanam to fa'elohay isingan a fana', i 1953 miheca malaplap pasadak, minokay tayra i Belgium . Yosif (Ruose) isingan Itiya cango'ot ko Ciayi sa'etal kiwkay to sapipatirengaw to isingan i Yunlinsien, nawhani oya ci Song Ciao sakiisingan to pikinsa ato pilintoking a fana', saka pa'ayawen ni Bi Yaoyuan cingra a mikerid tonini . I 1955 miheca 6 folad, oya ci Song Ciao pakatamina nai Belgium a tayni Taywan, ikor no 3 fiolad tangasa i Kilong minato . I 1955 miheca 12 folad, Yosif (Ruose) isingan misatapang, ci Song Ciao ko kakeridan itiya . Nawhani i taliyok no sa'etal awaay ko nga'ayay a isingan, oya Joseph (Ruose) isingan to ko tadamaanay to isingan i Yunlinsien, ni Song Ciao a tekedan nifana'an to pilintoking manga'ay i ma'engiday ko fala' (haykikkak), Amipa kapiyasan a pikingsa, mapadamso ko ta'akay sadama, mahirateng ni Bi Yaoyuan ko nipilintoking to cecay romi'ad ira ko lima, enemay so'ot ko tamdaw to Huwiy nicong a mitiliday . I pisatapangan, polong no isingan tatosa ko ising, tatosa ko kangkoho, ato mamo'etepay ko simpo siwni . Ikor to ira ci Cai Bexun tayni matayal, o nano Haimensien a tamdaw, o nano Tingsokiw sa'etal kakeridan nikiliman ni Niu Huicing Cociao nai Tayciw patayni . I 1969 miheca, o dengan fafahiyan a ising no Yosif (Ruose) isingan miliyasay, oya ci Song Ciao mikotayay no 803 isingan ci Ma Fulong ising . Tona mapatireng ko Yosif (Ruose) isingan, o loma' ni Song Ciao itira sa i katayalan no yinciw, to dadayadaya manga'ay ningra miliso' to adadaay a mitolon, sakalalicay no adadaay . Caay papi Takaen ningra ko midipotay kangkoho, paretatenga o katayo no matayalay kangkoho ira ko kacango'otan . Satapangan, o masiponay ko Yosif (Ruose) isingan, saka militado ci Song Ciao to nai Belgium a kakiharan, milada' to pakingking no kiwkay ato widawidang a padamso, roma tayra sa i Europ mirakat pasorot, sapilakec to kararimaan cango'ot sakidafong no isingan . Marahiday ko 'orip ningra, malakakeridan no isingan caay pilikapo . Ikor no romi'ad, o pangangan no tamdaw cingraan paka ci "Song Ciao mama" a han pakalayap to saka 3 rekad isingan pacakat kompay no Taywan, sapinokayan tayra i Belgium mipalada' to widang to katadamaan i, nika awaay ko sapi'aca to kippo no hikoki a minokay, ikor o kapot matayal i isingan ko misopsopay to payso padama, ta manga'ay aca minokay tayra i Belgium a sapikalic . Tona tanektek to ko rakat no Yosif (Ruose) isingan, caay sapidadahalaw patireng to isingan, o kinairaan a payso ato misorotan payso patayraen ningra patireng to kikingkay, sapadang to pakatiihay wawa, pakosiya tamdaw, mapilihay tamdaw . Dengan pakosiya a tamdaw, oya cango'otay wawa o sarakatay padipotan. 'Ayaw maledef ko mapilihay kaemangay wawa, o Yosif (Ruose) isingan pakayni yolansya micolo' to adadaay tayra 'amis paising, patireng to sarakatay pacarcaran paising no wawa ato 24 tokian kacalohan no wawa paising i Yunlin, patireng to dengan pitomadawan to makemaay wawa pipaisingan i Yunlin, itiya patireng to li'ayawan paising no wawa ato piyatayatan. Maledef to ko Cienpaw no finawlan itiya, caay kai cienpaw ko pinengneng a todong ni Song Ciao, dotoc sa to caayay demaken no roma a isingan, caay ka nengneng no sifo, nika oya kangalayan no safaay no syakay a sakiisingan tayalan naira . Awaay manengneng ko A, Rh remes ni Song Ciao, tangasa i 1993 miheca ira to ko 37 mihecaan to pasadak to remes a kafana'en cingraan . O kapot no Yisiao no Huweicen cingra, tangasa karaodan no mihecaan a misawad ko tayal . Kalitengan miheca I 2002 miheca, Yosif (Ruose) isingan a tomadaway (Tongsihui) mitahidang to nai Takao Cangkeng wawa isingan kakeridan ci Huang Chongbin ko citodongay saka 2 rekad a yinciw, oya mata'elifay to 40 miheca a kakeridan ci Song Ciao simpo palakomongen no isingan . Mato'as to mihecaan ningra, I 2006 mihecaan 8 folad misitapang to mafoti' to adada, i 2007 miheca 10 folad 2 romi'ad dadaya 11 ko toki nao adihayay kasamo'an no tireng a mapatay to . Paikor no sowal ningra a tilid: "O nipatorodan no Wama i kakarayan takowanan, nanay o Yosif (Ruose) isingan mala ciolahay ato cisini'adaay ko nidemakan, padama to adadaay ato laloma'an, ngalef oya pakoyocay tamdaw, marariday malawa nosyakay a tamdaw a kasini'adaan tamdaw cangra." , 13 romi'ad mapatayra i patademan no Tingsokiw, okinacecay manengneng miraod ci Cang Huimei, paradiw to "O sini'ada no Kawas", ato nano radiw ni Cang Yuseng to "Ikoran ko nikafana'" . Matadeem i Minsiong Tingsokiw tadamaanay lotok pitademan . Pinengnengan to tilid 2. ).

no~u wawa ato~u pijatajatan. ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf to~u ko~u ¶i…ônpaw no~u finaw…ĺan itija, ¶aaj kai ¶i…ônpaw ko~u pin…ôŇčn…ôŇč a to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč ni so~uŇč ¶iao~u, …¨~…ģo~uto~u ¶ sa to~u ¶aajaj …¨~…ģ…ômak…ôn misawa…¨~…ģ ko~u taja…ĺ . ka…ĺit…ôŇčan mińß…ô ¶a i **** mińß…ô ¶a, jo~usif (ro~u~uo~us…ô) isiŇčan a to~uma…¨~…ģawaj (to~uŇčsińßo~u~ui) mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u nai takao~u ¶aŇčk…ôŇč wawa isiŇčan kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i ńßo~u~uaŇč ¶ńßo~uŇčb~b~vin ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj saka * r…ôka…¨~…ģ a jin ¶iw, o~uja mata °…ô…ĺifaj to~u ** mińß…ô ¶a a kak…ôri…¨~…ģan ¶i so~uŇč ¶iao~u simpo~u pa…ĺako~umo~uŇč…ôn no~u isiŇčan . mato~u °as to~u mińß…ô ¶aan niŇčra, i **** mińß…ô ¶aan * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ misitapaŇč to~u mafo~uti ° to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, i **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaja ** ko~u to~uki nao~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj kasamo~u °an no~u tir…ôŇč a mapataj to~u . paiko~ur no~u so~uwa…ĺ niŇčra a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ: "o~u nipato~uro~u…¨~…ģan no~u wama i kakarajan tako~uwanan, nanaj o~u jo~usif (ro~u~uo~us…ô) isiŇčan ma…ĺa ¶io~u…ĺańßaj ato~u ¶isini °a…¨~…ģaaj ko~u ni…¨~…ģ…ômakan, pa…¨~…ģama to~u a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaaj ato~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an, Ňča…ĺ…ôf o~uja pako~ujo~u ¶aj tam…¨~…ģaw, marari…¨~…ģaj ma…ĺawa no~usjakaj a tam…¨~…ģaw a kasini °a…¨~…ģaan tam…¨~…ģaw ¶aŇčra." , ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ mapatajra i pata…¨~…ģ…ôman no~u tiŇčso~ukiw, o~ukina ¶…ô ¶aj man…ôŇčn…ôŇč mirao~u…¨~…ģ ¶i ¶aŇč ńßo~u~uim…ôi, para…¨~…ģiw to~u "o~u sini °a…¨~…ģa no~u kawas", ato~u nano~u ra…¨~…ģiw ni ¶aŇč jo~u~us…ôŇč to~u "iko~uran ko~u nikafana °" . mata…¨~…ģ…ô…ôm i minsio~uŇč tiŇčso~ukiw ta…¨~…ģamaanaj …ĺo~uto~uk pita…¨~…ģ…ôman . pin…ôŇčn…ôŇčan to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ *. ).
S.FORM: == Song Ciao simpo == Song Ciao (Inkiris: Georges Massin, 1916 miheca 9 folad 2 romi'ad ‚Äď 2007 miheca 10 folad 2 romi'ad), pangangan sa ci "Song Ciao mama", o nano Belgium Tinsokiwkay niocoran a tarokos, o sakapot patirengay to Joseph (Ruose) isingan i Yunlinsien no Taywan, saka tolo rekad pakalayapay to isingan pacakatay to kompay. Salongan pasifana' to 'orip 'Ayaway miheca Song Ciao, i 1916 miheca 9 folad 2 romi'ad masofoc i Belgium, i 1942 miheca 7 folad 25 romi'ad i Leuven no Tingsokiw daykako, macakat malasimpo, malakapot ci Lei Mingyuan simpo tayra i Jiangsu no Congko patenakay . Sa'ayaw i, maocor cingra tayra i cecay kanatal no Haimensien i Jiangsu patenakay . Mapatireng ko Conghuarenmin kongheko itiya i, marofo ko kakeridan, ma'edef ko kiwkay, oya sato ci Song Ciao tayra sato i isingan no salikaka malacitodongay milintokingay tayal, nanoyaan minanam to fa'elohay isingan a fana', i 1953 miheca malaplap pasadak, minokay tayra i Belgium . Yosif (Ruose) isingan Itiya cango'ot ko Ciayi sa'etal kiwkay to sapipatirengaw to isingan i Yunlinsien, nawhani oya ci Song Ciao sakiisingan to pikinsa ato pilintoking a fana', saka pa'ayawen ni Bi Yaoyuan cingra a mikerid tonini . I 1955 miheca 6 folad, oya ci Song Ciao pakatamina nai Belgium a tayni Taywan, ikor no 3 fiolad tangasa i Kilong minato . I 1955 miheca 12 folad, Yosif (Ruose) isingan misatapang, ci Song Ciao ko kakeridan itiya . Nawhani i taliyok no sa'etal awaay ko nga'ayay a isingan, oya Joseph (Ruose) isingan to ko tadamaanay to isingan i Yunlinsien, ni Song Ciao a tekedan nifana'an to pilintoking manga'ay i ma'engiday ko fala' (haykikkak), Amipa kapiyasan a pikingsa, mapadamso ko ta'akay sadama, mahirateng ni Bi Yaoyuan ko nipilintoking to cecay romi'ad ira ko lima, enemay so'ot ko tamdaw to Huwiy nicong a mitiliday . I pisatapangan, polong no isingan tatosa ko ising, tatosa ko kangkoho, ato mamo'etepay ko simpo siwni . Ikor to ira ci Cai Bexun tayni matayal, o nano Haimensien a tamdaw, o nano Tingsokiw sa'etal kakeridan nikiliman ni Niu Huicing Cociao nai Tayciw patayni . I 1969 miheca, o dengan fafahiyan a ising no Yosif (Ruose) isingan miliyasay, oya ci Song Ciao mikotayay no 803 isingan ci Ma Fulong ising . Tona mapatireng ko Yosif (Ruose) isingan, o loma' ni Song Ciao itira sa i katayalan no yinciw, to dadayadaya manga'ay ningra miliso' to adadaay a mitolon, sakalalicay no adadaay . Caay papi Takaen ningra ko midipotay kangkoho, paretatenga o katayo no matayalay kangkoho ira ko kacango'otan . Satapangan, o masiponay ko Yosif (Ruose) isingan, saka militado ci Song Ciao to nai Belgium a kakiharan, milada' to pakingking no kiwkay ato widawidang a padamso, roma tayra sa i Europ mirakat pasorot, sapilakec to kararimaan cango'ot sakidafong no isingan . Marahiday ko 'orip ningra, malakakeridan no isingan caay pilikapo . Ikor no romi'ad, o pangangan no tamdaw cingraan paka ci "Song Ciao mama" a han pakalayap to saka 3 rekad isingan pacakat kompay no Taywan, sapinokayan tayra i Belgium mipalada' to widang to katadamaan i, nika awaay ko sapi'aca to kippo no hikoki a minokay, ikor o kapot matayal i isingan ko misopsopay to payso padama, ta manga'ay aca minokay tayra i Belgium a sapikalic . Tona tanektek to ko rakat no Yosif (Ruose) isingan, caay sapidadahalaw patireng to isingan, o kinairaan a payso ato misorotan payso patayraen ningra patireng to kikingkay, sapadang to pakatiihay wawa, pakosiya tamdaw, mapilihay tamdaw . Dengan pakosiya a tamdaw, oya cango'otay wawa o sarakatay padipotan. 'Ayaw maledef ko mapilihay kaemangay wawa, o Yosif (Ruose) isingan pakayni yolansya micolo' to adadaay tayra 'amis paising, patireng to sarakatay pacarcaran paising no wawa ato 24 tokian kacalohan no wawa paising i Yunlin, patireng to dengan pitomadawan to makemaay wawa pipaisingan i Yunlin, itiya patireng to li'ayawan paising no wawa ato piyatayatan. Maledef to ko Cienpaw no finawlan itiya, caay kai cienpaw ko pinengneng a todong ni Song Ciao, dotoc sa to caayay demaken no roma a isingan, caay ka nengneng no sifo, nika oya kangalayan no safaay no syakay a sakiisingan tayalan naira . Awaay manengneng ko A, Rh remes ni Song Ciao, tangasa i 1993 miheca ira to ko 37 mihecaan to pasadak to remes a kafana'en cingraan . O kapot no Yisiao no Huweicen cingra, tangasa karaodan no mihecaan a misawad ko tayal . Kalitengan miheca I 2002 miheca, Yosif (Ruose) isingan a tomadaway (Tongsihui) mitahidang to nai Takao Cangkeng wawa isingan kakeridan ci Huang Chongbin ko citodongay saka 2 rekad a yinciw, oya mata'elifay to 40 miheca a kakeridan ci Song Ciao simpo palakomongen no isingan . Mato'as to mihecaan ningra, I 2006 mihecaan 8 folad misitapang to mafoti' to adada, i 2007 miheca 10 folad 2 romi'ad dadaya 11 ko toki nao adihayay kasamo'an no tireng a mapatay to . Paikor no sowal ningra a tilid: "O nipatorodan no Wama i kakarayan takowanan, nanay o Yosif (Ruose) isingan mala ciolahay ato cisini'adaay ko nidemakan, padama to adadaay ato laloma'an, ngalef oya pakoyocay tamdaw, marariday malawa nosyakay a tamdaw a kasini'adaan tamdaw cangra." , 13 romi'ad mapatayra i patademan no Tingsokiw, okinacecay manengneng miraod ci Cang Huimei, paradiw to "O sini'ada no Kawas", ato nano radiw ni Cang Yuseng to "Ikoran ko nikafana'" . Matadeem i Minsiong Tingsokiw tadamaanay lotok pitademan . Pinengnengan to tilid 2. ).
